titles.en: Reward of Ziyarat of Masuma Qum
Reward of Ziyarat of Masuma Qum

segments: حَدَّثَنَا عَلِیُّ بْنُ إِبْرَاهِیمَ عَنْ أَبِیهِ عَنْ سَعْدِ بْنِ سَعِیدٍ عَنْ أَبِی الْحَسَنِ الرِّضَا ع قَالَ: سَأَلْتُهُ عَنْ قَبْرِ فَاطِمَهَ بِنْتِ مُوسَی بْنِ جَعْفَرٍ ع فَقَالَ مَنْ زَارَهَا فَلَهُ الْجَنَّهُ.
arabic.text: حَدَّثَنَا عَلِیُّ بْنُ إِبْرَاهِیمَ عَنْ أَبِیهِ عَنْ سَعْدِ بْنِ سَعِیدٍ عَنْ أَبِی الْحَسَنِ الرِّضَا ع قَالَ: سَأَلْتُهُ عَنْ قَبْرِ فَاطِمَهَ بِنْتِ مُوسَی بْنِ جَعْفَرٍ ع فَقَالَ مَنْ زَارَهَا فَلَهُ الْجَنَّهُ.

segments: 1. My father (rh) said: it was narrated to us by Ali b. Ibrahim from his father from Sa’d b. Sa’eed from Abi al-Hassan al-Rida (a.s.) who said: I (the narrator) asked him regarding the grave of Fatima binte Musa bin Ja'far (a.s.). He (the Imam) replied, “Whoever visits her will get Paradise.”
en.sayed-athar-husain-rizvi-&-sayed-maqs.text: 1. My father (rh) said: it was narrated to us by Ali b. Ibrahim from his father from Sa’d b. Sa’eed from Abi al-Hassan al-Rida (a.s.) who said: I (the narrator) asked him regarding the grave of Fatima binte Musa bin Ja'far (a.s.). He (the Imam) replied, “Whoever visits her will get Paradise.”
